note: Calibration patch release. BUG-1: match_confidence formula in recall_hybrid() corrected (vec_score replaces final_score/1.5). ORDER BY uses final_score (unchanged) — recall ranking is identical to v0.7.0. match_confidence is an OUTPUT column only; it does not affect ranking. Analytical carry-forward is valid.

bug_fix.description: recall_hybrid() match_confidence was computed as LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(0.0, final_score/1.5)). final_score is RRF-scale (~0.008-0.05), not weighted-sum scale (~0-1.5), so the formula produced values ~0.005 for good hits. Fix: use vec_score (cosine similarity, already [0,1] by pgvector guarantee).
bug_fix.scoring_impact: none — ORDER BY final_score DESC is unchanged; only match_confidence output value changes

minor_2.description: New overloaded reinforce(BIGINT[], TEXT) RETURNS INT — batch form that skips missing lesson_ids (CONTINUE, no RAISE) and returns count updated. Scalar reinforce(BIGINT, TEXT) unchanged.

minor_3.description: COMMENT on recall_hybrid() updated: corrected match_confidence formula description, added note that graph_proximity contributes only when mem_edge is populated.

carry_forward_rationale: ORDER BY f.final_score DESC in recall_hybrid() is unchanged. match_confidence is a derived output column that does not feed back into scoring or ranking. The fix changes only the displayed value of match_confidence, not recall@10 ordering. LongMemEval-S benchmark carry-forward is analytically valid.

tests: pg_regress test_v071 (T1-T6: match_confidence≈cosine, batch reinforce skip, regression guard)
pg_regress test_v070 (T1-T9: all v0.7.0 tests still pass, no regression)
fresh install: CREATE EXTENSION pgmnemo VERSION '0.7.1'
upgrade path: CREATE EXTENSION pgmnemo VERSION '0.7.0' + ALTER EXTENSION pgmnemo UPDATE TO '0.7.1'
smoke_gate.new_test: test_v071 — covers BUG-1 fix, batch reinforce, recall_lessons non-regression
